positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration featuring a majestic mountain range silhouette bathed in the warm, golden light of dawn. The foreground elements include subtle abstract geometric patterns and scattered stylized floral motifs (e.g., lotuses, simple leaves). The color palette should be restricted to deep indigo, burnt orange, cream, and soft teal. The composition must be centrally balanced, suitable for repeating or singular placement on apparel, with sharp, clean lines and high contrast between the silhouettes and the gradient sky. Vector art style, perfect for screen printing, highly detailed, UHD, clean.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, words, signature, logo, watermark, artifact, low contrast, bad composition, extra limbs, badly rendered hands, modernism, hyperrealism, photo, sketch
